bash --noprofile --norc -c 'x=AbC; printf "bash=%s|" ${x^^}; x=abc; printf "%s|" ${x:1:1}; arr=(a b); printf "%s|" ${arr[@]}; printf "%s|" ${!arr[@]}; x=abc; printf "%s\n" ${x/a/A}'
